final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the loan duration is longer, because of extended repayment periods, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that there is no checking account, because of the absence of a checking account, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that the account balance is below zero, because of negative account balances, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

evidence_sentences.sentence: The reduced model therefore retains only variables that demonstrate statistical relevance or clear theoretical importance in credit-risk modeling.

Note that the exposures to interest rate risk and the exposure to credit risk are measured relative to the shock sizes of different stress tests so that the size of the coefficient cannot be interpreted, only its sign.
